title: BetterCombat x Aquamirae
body:
**BetterCombat x Aquamirae** — is a datapack that offers compatibility between the missing [Aquamirae](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquamirae) and [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat). 

## ⚙️ Compatibility

* [Aquamirae](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquamirae)
* [Obscure API](https://modrinth.com/mod/obscure-api)
* [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)
* [playerAnimator](https://modrinth.com/mod/playeranimator)
* [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)

## 💬 Community
Join our [community on the discord server](https://discord.gg/nSJBpkeVv6) to chat, ask questions, or share your creations!
